Every State, a Unique Flavour
From snow-capped Himalayas to the lush Northeast — click any state to explore its authentic products and culture.

🎿 Himachal Pradesh — Dev Bhoomi

Himachal Pradesh is the true Dev Bhoomi — a land where ancient temples cling to cliff-faces and apple orchards fill every valley. Sudhir, our founder, grew up here and knows these hills intimately. From the fragrant Deodar pine forests of Kufri to the misty tea gardens of Kangra, every product carries the soul of these mountains. The same cold, clean air that makes these apples glow red also gives HP's honey its rare pine-forest depth.

🍎 Apple & ACV🍯 Pine Honey🍵 Kangra Tea🧈 Bilona Ghee🌰 Chilgoza Pine Nuts
HP Special

Pahadi Apple Cider Vinegar
Raw, unfiltered ACV from hand-picked Shimla apples. With the mother — full of natural probiotics.

Collected from hives in Deodar pine forests at 2,400m. Distinctive resinous notes, dark amber colour.

🏔️ Uttarakhand — Dev Bhoomi

Kumaon and Garhwal — sacred Himalayan land of ancient temples, dense forests, and glacial rivers. The vibrant Garhwali dance tradition in colourful tartan costumes is part of a living culture that also produces wild multifloral honey, deep-red Pahadi rajma, and precious Badri cow ghee from meadows above 3,000 metres.

🍯 Wild Honey🫘 Pahadi Rajma🌸 Buransh Juice🧈 Badri Ghee🌿 Jakhiya
Bestseller

Wild Forest Honey
Collected by tribal beekeepers from Kumaon's ancient forests. Dark, raw, multifloral and mineral-rich.

Pahadi Red Rajma
Small, intense, protein-rich kidney beans from 1,800m altitude. Cooks beautifully creamy every time.
₹280

Made from Uttarakhand's state flower. Tangy, antioxidant-rich, and utterly unique to the Pahad.
₹450₹380

Organic
Uttarakhand · Badrinath
Badri Cow A2 Ghee
From the rare Badri breed. Hand-churned in small batches using the ancient Bilona method.

🌷 Jammu & Kashmir — Paradise on Earth

Where women adorn themselves with cascading silver jewellery and intricately embroidered Kashmiri Pherans — the same craft tradition found beside the shimmering Dal Lake. Kashmir's extraordinary Kesar blooms in Pampore, paper-shelled Kagzi walnuts ripen in ancient orchards, and the legendary Kahwa warms cold mountain mornings.

🌺 Kashmiri Kesar🌰 Kagzi Walnuts🍃 Kahwa Tea🌶️ Kashmiri Mirchi🍑 Almonds
🌺Pampore
Premium

₹649 / 1g

☀️ Ladakh — Land of High Passes

At 3,500m above sea level, women wear the magnificent Perak headdress adorned with turquoise gems — a tradition carried across centuries of high-altitude life. Ladakh's extreme altitude and cold desert creates superfoods found nowhere else — the miraculous Seabuckthorn berry, ancient Shilajit resin, and sun-dried apricots from Kargil's orchards.

🟠 Seabuckthorn⚫ Shilajit🍑 Wild Apricots🌾 Black Buckwheat🧂 Rock Salt
🟠Nubra Valley
Superfood
Ladakh · Nubra Valley
Seabuckthorn Berry Juice
12x more Vitamin C than oranges. Wild-harvested from Ladakh's cold river valleys at 3,000m.
₹599₹499

₹1,299 / 20g

Ladakhi Black Buckwheat
Grown at 3,500m. Cold-hardy, nutrient-dense — a Ladakhi staple packed with minerals and rutin.
₹249

🌸 Sikkim — India's First Organic State

India's only fully organic state since 2016. Sikkim's dancers in vibrant striped Bakhu dresses and colourful Pangden aprons celebrate a culture deeply rooted in nature and Buddhism. These pristine hills produce exceptional large cardamom — the "Black Gold" — and award-winning Temi orthodox tea from India's only government-run tea estate.

🫙 Large Cardamom🟡 Organic Turmeric🍃 Temi Tea🌿 Organic Ginger🫙 Gundruk
🫙East Sikkim
Certified
Sikkim · East District
Sikkim Large Cardamom
The "Black Gold" of Sikkim. Smoky, complex, intensely aromatic — grown in forest shade at altitude.
₹599 / 100g

Wild Turmeric Powder

₹229

🍵 Assam — The Tea Capital of the World

The Bihu festival fills the Brahmaputra valley with the grace of mekhela chadors and the beat of dhols. These same fertile plains produce the world's most consumed tea, rare aromatic black Joha rice, and the probiotic-rich bamboo shoot pickle central to Assamese cuisine.

🍵 Orthodox Tea🌾 Black Joha Rice🫙 Bamboo Pickle🍯 Forest Honey🍍 Queen Pineapple
🍵Brahmaputra Valley
Bestseller
Assam · Brahmaputra Valley
Assam Orthodox Loose Tea
Single-estate orthodox tea from Assam's finest gardens. Bold, malty, deep amber in the cup.
₹399₹299

🌧️ Meghalaya — Abode of Clouds

The wettest place on earth, where Khasi women in vibrant orange Jainsem dresses and layered beaded necklaces carry the wisdom of a matrilineal society. Living root bridges arch over crystal streams. Meghalaya's cloud-soaked hills produce the world's highest-curcumin Lakadong turmeric and wild forest honey.

🟡 Lakadong Turmeric⚫ Wild Black Pepper🍯 Wild Honey🌿 Bay Leaf🧅 Hill Ginger
🟡Jaintia Hills
World's Best
Meghalaya · Jaintia Hills
Lakadong Turmeric Powder
7–12% curcumin — highest in the world. Deep orange, intensely fragrant, prized by Ayurvedic practitioners.
₹349₹279

🌶️ Nagaland — Land of Festivals & Fire

Home to 16 fierce and proud tribes, where warriors wear hornbill feather headdresses and beaded necklaces that tell their ancestry. The Hornbill Festival blazes with colour every December. Nagaland produces the legendary Bhut Jolokia (Ghost Pepper), rich wild hill honey, and Axone fermented soybean — the soul of Naga cooking.

🌶️ Bhut Jolokia🍯 Wild Hill Honey🫙 Axone (Fermented)🌿 Wild Herbs🧂 Tribal Salt
🌶️Tribal Farms
Legendary
Nagaland · Tribal Farms

₹249 / 50g

Nagaland · Forest Tribes
Wild Naga Forest Honey
Harvested by tribal communities from ancient forests. Dark, robust, complex wild floral notes.
₹549

Tribal

Axone — Fermented Soybean
The soul of Naga cuisine. A pungent, probiotic-rich condiment essential to traditional cooking.
₹199

Why Choose Pahadi Roots
The Pahadi Roots Promise
🏔️

Direct from Farmers

No middlemen. We work directly with small family farms and tribal communities across the Himalayas and Northeast.

🔬

Lab-Tested Purity

Every batch tested for authenticity. No adulteration, no shortcuts. Full transparency on every product we ship.

♻️

Eco-Friendly Packaging

Recyclable, minimal packaging. The same forests that give us these products — we protect them every day.

💚

Community Welfare

Fair prices, always. A portion of every sale directly supports the farming families who grow these treasures.
